component.name: Subsound
component.summary: Stream music from your Navidrome Server

description.p: Subsound is a GTK4/Adwaita music player for Subsonic-compatible streaming servers, with Navidrome as the primary target. It lets you browse artists, albums, and playlists from your personal music server and plays them back directly or from a local cache.

ul.li: Browse and play music from Navidrome or any Subsonic-compatible server
Playlist management
Starred songs and downloaded songs views
Offline playback from a local song cache
Offline first scrobble back to server
MPRIS media player integration for desktop media controls
Native GTK4/Adwaita interface designed for GNOME

description.p: For offline mode, remember to first Sync Library.

ul.li: New: desktop media controls can now toggle shuffle and repeat via MPRIS, and reflect the current mode
New: activating Subsound from desktop media controls now raises the window to the foreground
Bugfix: improved track meta sent over MPRIS
Bugfix: sometimes the currently playing row was not highlighted correctly after shuffle
New: Settings page now shows which OpenSubsonic extensions your server supports
Improved: app startup is faster when the server is unreachable or you are offline
Improved: opening the Downloads playlist is now much faster for large libraries
Improved: album action menu is properly sized
New: redesigned playback scrubber with a cleaner look and feel
New: sort playlists by title or artist by clicking the column header
New: reportPlayback: playback progress is reported to your server in real time on servers that advertise OpenSubsonic playback reporting
Improved: more server details shown on the Settings page
Improved: artist, album-artist and mood metadata are now stored locally for richer offline browsing
Improved: faster playlist scrolling and album-art rendering, especially for large libraries
Bugfix: re-downloading a song now always fetches the current transcoded format from the server
Bugfix: shuffle and repeat buttons in the player bar now show the correct state right after startup
Bugfix: fixed a race where the same song could start downloading twice at once
Bugfix: fixed sizing of the onboarding/server-config form so it no longer renders too narrow
New: "Now Playing" is reported to your server while you listen, so other Subsonic clients can see what's playing
New: seek support over MPRIS — jump to any position in the current track from desktop media controls
Bugfix: Fixed scrobble occasionally being recorded against the next track in the queue instead of the one that just finished
New: quick-filter search in playlist views — press Ctrl+F or start typing to filter by title, artist, or album
New: download status counter so you can see at a glance how many songs are downloaded
New: offline play history is now kept and scrobbled back to the server when you come back online
"Clear song cache" now immediately updates the song list and download counts
Fixed an issue where cover art could fail to load under spotty network conditions
Play queue is now saved and restored across app restarts
Fixed sometimes app not exiting cleanly
Browse albums
Browse artists
Browse playlists
Offline mode
MPRIS Support
